genre_refs: nostalgic Christmas illustration (Thomas Kinkade-style 'cozy Americana'); AI-generated art
description: A Christmas-themed graphic in a painted or AI-illustrated style. The nighttime winter scene shows a snow-covered two-story red-brick colonial house with glowing yellow windows, a wreath on the front door, and falling snow. On the steep roof, two men in jackets are stringing a strand of multicolored Christmas lights along the eaves, with a tall ladder leaning up to them and a few more figures standing in the snowy yard below. Across the middle of the image, in a thin white serif font, is the on-image caption: 'this and deporting criminal illegal aliens'. The tweet text reads 'Avoid the deportation flight this Christmas - go home comfortably with $3,000 for your family. Download the CBP Home app today!'.
notable_text: this and deporting criminal illegal aliens (tweet: Avoid the deportation flight this Christmas - go home comfortably with $3,000 for your family. Download the CBP Home app today!)
